changes.before: When the wind shifted, Sylvanas tasted pitch and wet ash.
changes.after: When the wind shifted, Sylvanas tasted wet ash.

changes.before: "No burial pits," she said. "No attempt at them. They took what they could drag and left the rest to the cold..."
changes.after: "No burial pits," she said. "They took what they could drag and left the rest to the cold..."

changes.before: The march paragraph lingered on multiple terrain obstacles and repeated the same attrition point.
changes.after: The march now keeps one ridge, one frozen soldier, and one bad-footing beat before moving on.

changes.before: The dwarven camp description carried extra wall-height, seam, and fuel-management explanation.
changes.after: The camp now lands as ugly, solid, smoky, and disciplined in one fast read.

changes.before: "He passed here with survivors and left with fewer ... Said a great many things. The only true one was..."
changes.after: "He passed here with survivors and left with fewer ... The only true thing he said was..."

changes.before: "I've seen pairs miss easier handoffs in drill yards. She speaks, ye move. Ye move, she changes the ground under it. No wasted shouting..."
changes.after: "I've seen pairs miss easier handoffs in drill yards. She speaks, ye move. Ye move, she changes the ground under it."

changes.before: The cave-threshold paragraph stacked extra bodily annotation on top of the ward warning.
changes.after: The threshold now keeps the pushback, the hard cold, and the rigid bow leather.

changes.before: Arthas studied the arrow wound with extra explanatory reaction text before pulling it free.
changes.after: He closes a hand around the shaft and pulls it free.

changes.before: Whatever had stood in that chamber wearing Arthas's face had left the prince behind with the hammer in the snow.
changes.after: Whatever had stood in that chamber wearing Arthas's face had left the prince behind.

flags: config.json's priming.styleTarget is placeholder text; calibrated this pass against .afternoon/style-guide.json, story-arc tone notes, and the Sylvanas/Jaina voice sheets.
observations: Wordcount cut from 5261 to 4734, a reduction of 527 words (10.0%).
The harbor opener now lands as one evidence sweep instead of repeating wreckage logic in adjacent sentences.
Pitch, ash, crate hoops, ration casks, and sled grooves were kept because they do scene work; softer duplication around them was cut.
Jaina's bread beat stayed because chapter 20's contamination carry-forward still matters here.
Dagny's harbor beat was trimmed to ship-readiness and time pressure only.
Cyndia's first report lost one redundant setup sentence and kept the hard facts.
Sylvanas's trail read was tightened toward cost language and away from second-pass explanation.
Dragonblight travel still feels hostile, but the chapter no longer re-proves attrition every paragraph.
The frozen soldier remains because he prices the march in bodies instead of scenery.
The bad-ground sequence now moves faster into the smoke sighting and the camp turn.
The dwarven camp keeps its repair-built solidity without pausing on every engineering detail.
Muradin's entrance still lands as recognizably dwarven: blunt, practical, slightly warm around the edges.
The shelter briefing now favors what changes the chase over what merely colors it.
Muradin's read of Arthas stays brutal and specific, but one extra explanation pass was cut.
Jaina's plague-to-blade explanation remains plain enough to sound spoken under pressure.
Muradin's outsider read of the partnership is shorter and less self-congratulatory while still naming the handoff truth.
The cave approach still carries Light's Vengeance, the runes, and the no-tracks-out verdict; extra threshold staging was trimmed.
The ward at the mouth now reads as immediate physical rejection instead of layered annotation.
The chamber still distinguishes live-looking soldiers from the wrong stillness under the blade.
Arthas's arrow-survival beat got leaner and hit harder once the reflective pause was cut.
Jaina's failed strike and sideways-splitting field remain the key mechanical reveal of the fight.
Muradin's shard hit still lands as the fight's break point; secondary explanation around it was reduced.
Retreat geometry remains clean: barrier, carry order, count, half-run, no pursuit.
The final glacier descent no longer repeats the same no-blame conclusion twice.
Jaina's seam-work survives intact and stays the chapter's carry-forward gift into chapter 22.
Dialogue register stayed clean in quoted speech after the pass; surviving technical language reads arcane, embodied, and spoken rather than clinical or memo-like.
